use_cases: Hero section animated background for landing pages
Visual backdrop for marketing and product showcase pages
Animated gradient atmosphere for portfolio and creative sites
Eye-catching background for SaaS and fintech landing pages
Decorative animated element for e-commerce product showcases
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered animated gradient wave component that renders fluid, flowing color gradients on a canvas using custom shader-based rendering. Features smooth continuous animation with customizable color transitions, perfect for creating immersive hero section backdrops and animated visual atmospheres on landing pages and marketing sites.
